name: Spam Hot and Spicy Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons House of Tsang Mongolian Chilli Paste
14 ounces Whole baby corn, drained and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine teriyaki sauce, water, Mongolian chilli paste, and ginger. Set aside.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
3. Stir-fry SPAM, broccoli florets, onion, pea pods, and red pepper for 2 minutes until lightly browned.
4. Add the sauce mixture; stir well to coat the ingredients evenly.
5. Cook for a few more minutes until the sauce is bubbly.
6. Add baby corn and mushrooms to the pan; continue cooking until thoroughly heated through.
7. Serve over hot cooked rice.
